description: The Ray To Line Intersection Distance node determines the distance from a ray origin to the point at which the ray intersects a line segment defined by two points. This node is functionally equivalent to using the Ray To Line Intersection node, then plugging the value used for ``Origin`` and the ``Intersection`` output into a Distance node.

fields.LinePoint0: First point of the line segment.
fields.LinePoint1: Second point of the line segment.
fields.Distance: The Euclidean distance between ``Origin`` and the point at which the defined ray intersects with the line segment with endpoints ``LinePoint0`` and ``LinePoint1``. If the ray does not intersect, the value will be ``0``.
fields.Intersects: ``True`` if the ray intersects with the line segment, ``False`` otherwise. See Ray To Line Intersection for what counts as intersection.
